title: Madoku Craft: Levels
description: Madoku Craft: Levels is a configurable leveling system. You can upgrade your Stats by allocating points into an Attribute.
body:
## Overview:

Madoku Craft: Levels is a configurable leveling system.
You can upgrade your Stats by allocating points into an Attribute.
You can customize most of these features in the CONFIG files.

![Attributes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cebc3a687bd76e008d30a5a731994293fbf12e61.png)

Even more Attributes can be upgraded when this MOD is installed with Madoku Craft: Attributes and Madoku Craft: Compat.

## Dependencies:

- Fabric API
- Madoku Craft: API

## Implementation:

**Levels:**

- You can level up by gaining XP.
- You can open up the Menu by pressing K.

**Points:**

- You gain points by leveling up.
- Press the buttons to allocate a point.

**Upgrades:**

- You can upgrade Health, Strength, Defense, and Speed.
